# Page Template

Use this template when you add a new documentation page for 3AM.

The goal is to keep docs practical: explain what to do, where to edit, and how to verify.

## 1) What this page helps with

Explain the real task this page solves. Example: "This page explains how to add a reusable component with safe lifecycle and styling."

## 2) When to read this page

State the audience and the moment this page is useful.

## 3) Files you need to know

List only the important files for the topic.

## 4) Real workflow

Write the normal step-by-step flow as short paragraphs.

## 5) Example Pair

Show one bad pattern and one better pattern from this project.

```ts
// Problematic example

// Recommended example
```

## 6) Validation

Include commands that prove the change is correct.

```bash
bun test
bun run build
bun run docs:build
```

## 7) Practical notes

Add short notes for common mistakes, edge cases, or review expectations.
